name: social-graphic
description: Organic social images, story graphics, cover photos, event banners
usage_hint: Use for social media images, story graphics, cover photos, and event banners. These are visual assets designed for social feeds. If there's accompanying ad copy and it's a paid placement, use social-ad instead.

criteria.name: visual-impact
criteria.description: Social graphics must stop the scroll in a busy feed

criteria.name: visual-hierarchy
criteria.description: Clear hierarchy guides the eye to the key message

criteria.name: platform-native-craft
criteria.description: Graphics must feel at home on the target platform

criteria.name: platform-fit
criteria.description: Dimensions and style must match platform norms

criteria.name: call-to-action
criteria.description: Even organic graphics benefit from a visual or textual CTA

criteria.name: accessibility-inclusivity
criteria.description: Graphics must be accessible to users with visual impairments
